title: Localhost Enable Banking callback mismatch
description: Local development at http://localhost:3000 shows an origin mismatch because APP_BASE_URL / Enable Banking callback points at the production Tunnelmole URL. The browser reports expected origin https://mzcaco-ip-46-7-60-2.tunnelmole.net and callback https://mzcaco-ip-46-7-60-2.tunnelmole.net/api/enable-banking/callback while current origin is http://localhost:3000. Need either a second Enable Banking redirect URI for local/tunnel development or clearer local callback configuration so the bank consent flow can complete outside production.
acceptance_criteria: Local development has a documented and working callback option; the app no longer sends users into a callback origin mismatch during local testing; README/env docs explain when to use localhost, tunnel, or production APP_BASE_URL.

title: Add dynamic bank picker
description: Replace hardcoded bank connect buttons with a country-aware Enable Banking ASPSP picker, keeping the existing connect route and adding robust loading/empty/error states.
close_reason: Implemented dynamic country-aware ASPSP picker with loading, empty, error, account-type, and connect states.
